title: Alcohol/Drug Impaired Driving Prevention - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Alcohol/Drug Impaired Driving Prevention 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MOTHERS AGAINST DRUNK DRIVING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a helpline for those affected by drunk driving, drugged driving, and underage drinking. Victim advocates offer emotional support, advocacy in the criminal and civil justice systems, court accompaniment for victims/survivors, help to prepare victim impact statements, referrals to additional resources, connection to other victims/survivors, and educational materials. Support groups are available in many areas through local chapters. The agency focuses on increasing public awareness of and eventually eliminating drunk and drugged driving. Supports legislative measures that strive to reduce drunk driving crimes and provides Victim-Offender Panels. 511 E John Carpenter Freeway Suite 700 Irving, TX 75062 Eligibility: Individuals who have been affected by drunk or drugged driving or underage drinking Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (877) 623-3435 877 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
